title: Build the ability to add an entirely new Currency, that will proliferate throughout all currency columns by default, so that you dont have to go to each currency column on each form or table or dashboard and customise it individually.
excerpt: Build the ability to add an entirely new Currency, that will proliferate throughout all currency columns by default, so that you dont have to go to each currency column on each form or table or dashboard and customise it…

posts.author: DanielTurtledove (Daniel Turtledove)
posts.cookedHtml:
Build the ability to add an entirely new Currency, that will proliferate throughout all currency columns by default, so that you dont have to go to each currency column on each form or table or dashboard and customise it individually.
Currently you have to do this for each Column, each View, each Dashboard, each Chart, etc.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @DanielTurtledove There us an ability to add currency to multiple columns and to reflect it on dashboards and views with monday.com currency converter app Smart Columns. See below
